PAGE.TITLE: Login to your account
PAGE.SUBTITLE: Enter your email below to login to your account.

BLOCKED_ACCOUNT.TITLE: Your sign-in was blocked
BLOCKED_ACCOUNT.MESSAGE: Your account has been blocked after multiple consecutive login attempts.
BLOCKED_ACCOUNT.EMAIL_SENT: We've sent you a notification via email with instructions on how to unblock it.

RESET_PASSWORD.TITLE: Reset your password
RESET_PASSWORD.SUBTITLE: Type your email address to send instructions to reset your password to you inbox.

ERRORS.EMAIL_NOT_FOUND: This email does not exist in our database.

CHECK_INBOX.TITLE: Check your inbox
CHECK_INBOX.MESSAGE: We've sent you an email to [email]. Follow the instructions to access your account.

PROFILE.TITLE: Profile
PROFILE.SUCCESS_MESSAGE: Your updates have been saved successfully.

PASSWORD.TITLE: Password
PASSWORD.SUCCESS_MESSAGE: Your password has been changed successfully.
PASSWORD.REQUIREMENTS: Your new password must contain at least

CUSTOMIZATION.TITLE: Customization
CUSTOMIZATION.LANGUAGE_DESCRIPTION: This is the language that will be used in the dashboard.
CUSTOMIZATION.SUCCESS_MESSAGE: Your preferences have been saved successfully.

ERRORS.FIELD_REQUIRED: This field cannot be left blank.
ERRORS.PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 10 characters long.
ERRORS.PASSWORD_NO_LETTER: Password must contain at least 1 letter.
ERRORS.PASSWORD_NO_NUMBER_SPECIAL: Password must contain at least 1 number or special character.

UNSAVED_CHANGES.TITLE: Unsaved Changes
UNSAVED_CHANGES.MESSAGE: You have unsaved changes. If you leave now, your latest updates will be lost.

FONT.LABEL: Font
FONT.DESCRIPTION: Set the font you want to use in the tool.

THEME.LABEL: Theme
THEME.DESCRIPTION: Select the theme for the tool.

PDF_SIGNATURE.LABEL: PDF Signature
PDF_SIGNATURE.UPLOAD_INSTRUCTIONS: Click to upload your signature or drag and drop
PDF_SIGNATURE.REQUIREMENTS: Recommended ratio 21:9. Supported types: SVG, PNG or JPG. Max file size: 4MB
PDF_SIGNATURE.DESCRIPTION: This is the signature that will be displayed on your PDFs.

ERRORS.FILE_TOO_LARGE: File is too large. Max size is 4MB.

REMOVE_DIALOG.TITLE: Remove signature
REMOVE_DIALOG.DESCRIPTION: You're about to delete the organization's signature. This action is irreversible. Once deleted, it will be permanently removed.

ERRORS.INVALID_TYPE: File type not supported. Use SVG, PNG or JPG.

LANGUAGE.LABEL: Language
LANGUAGE.DESCRIPTION: This is the default language that will be used in the dashboard and tool.

CUSTOMIZATION_SUCCESS.TITLE: Account Information Updated
CUSTOMIZATION_SUCCESS.DESCRIPTION: Your customization settings have been saved successfully.

PDF_SIGNATURE_SUCCESS.TITLE: PDF Signature Updated
PDF_SIGNATURE_SUCCESS.DESCRIPTION: Your PDF signature has been updated successfully.

LANGUAGE_SUCCESS.TITLE: Language Updated
LANGUAGE_SUCCESS.DESCRIPTION: Your language preference has been saved successfully.

UNSAVED_CHANGES.TITLE: Unsaved Changes
UNSAVED_CHANGES.DESCRIPTION: You have unsaved changes. If you leave now, your latest updates will be lost.

AVATAR.LABEL: Avatar
AVATAR.REQUIREMENTS: Recommended ratio 1:1. Supported types: SVG, PNG or JPG. Max file size: 4MB

REMOVE_DIALOG.TITLE: Remove avatar
REMOVE_DIALOG.DESCRIPTION: You're about to delete the organization's avatar. This action is irreversible.

TOASTS.SUCCESS_DESCRIPTION: Your updates have been saved successfully.
